top_signals.title: US gaming industry groups urge Senate to ban sports prediction markets in crypto bill: report
top_signals.summary: US gaming groups called on Congress to ban sports and casino-style prediction markets in a crypto market structure bill, Semafor reported.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Messi hat trick equals goalscoring record as Argentina beats Algeria
top_signals.summary: Norway striker Erling ⁠Haaland also announced his arrival at the World Cup in typically emphatic fashion, with two goals in a majestic display against Iraq.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
